title: Repair Rust link signed receive and frame validation
description: Fix Rust lichen-link defects found after protocol alignment: signed receive checks payload instead of 48-byte MIC; parser accepts trailing bytes; serializer lacks address/MIC invariant validation; signed MIC flag combinations need explicit validation. Add malformed/short-payload tests and run all-features link tests.
close_reason: Fixed signed receive to validate the 48-byte MIC and verify the correct signed fields; rejected length-field trailing bytes; added serializer address/MIC/signature invariant checks and frame-size validation; added malformed, short-MIC, trailing, invariant, and short-payload tests. Verified cargo test -p lichen-link --all-features (64 unit, 2 integration, 1 doctest passed), cargo clippy -p lichen-link --all-features -- -D warnings, cargo fmt -p lichen-link -- --check, and git diff --check.
